title: scrophularia lucida
intro: Scrophularia lucida, also known as Wu Gong or Blue Skullcap, is a perennial plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Scrophularia lucida include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Scrophularia lucida include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
